document_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Eastern Passage/Cow Bay

provisions.text: ICH USES PERMITTED No development permit shall be issued in any ICH Zone except on lots in existence on the date of adoption (July 2, 2002) of this zone for the following: Single Unit Dwellings Shared housing use with 10 or fewer bedrooms in conjunction with a permitted dwelling unit (RC-Aug 9/22;E-Sep 15/22) Open Space Uses
ICH ZONE REQUIREMENTS In any ICH Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the requirements of the R-1 Zone.

content_blocks.text: No development permit shall be issued in any ICH Zone except on lots in existence on

In any ICH Zone, no development permit shall be issued except in conformity with the requirements of the R-1 Zone.

open_issues.description: Clause patterns listed in pending_review_clause_patterns were preserved raw because their hierarchy normalization is not yet approved in this repository context.
